zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean De Hastings於大約1260年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，她的父親Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings26歲，母親Joane de Cantilupe20歲。她和John Waldegrave , Sheriff of London至少有1個兒子。她去世於1271年享年12歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean De Hastings于大约1260年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，她的父亲Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings26岁，母亲Joane de Cantilupe20岁。她和John Waldegrave , Sheriff of London至少有1个儿子。她去世于1271年享年12岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean De Hastings was born about 1260, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, was 26 and her mother, Joane de Cantilupe, was 20. She had at least 1 son with John Waldegrave , Sheriff of London. She died in 1271, at the age of 12.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean De Hastings est née environ 1260, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joane de Cantilupe, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec John Waldegrave , Sheriff of London. Elle est décédée en 1271, à l’âge de 12 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean De Hastings um 1260 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings 26 und ihre Mutter Joane de Cantilupe 20. Sie hatte mit John Waldegrave , Sheriff of London mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1271 im Alter von 12 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean De Hastings è nata il circa 1260 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Joane de Cantilupe, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con John Waldegrave , Sheriff of London. Morì nel 1271, all'età di 12 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean De Hastingsが約1260年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsは26歳，母Joane de Cantilupeは20歳であった。彼女はJohn Waldegrave , Sheriff of Londonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1271年に12歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean De Hastings(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane de Cantilupe(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 John Waldegrave , Sheriff of London(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 12세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean De Hastings nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Cantilupe, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com John Waldegrave , Sheriff of London. Ela faleceu em 1271, com 12 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean De Hastings родилась около 1260 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Cantilupe, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от John Waldegrave , Sheriff of London. Она умерла в 1271 г. в возрасте 12 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean De Hastings nació aproximadamente 1260, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joane de Cantilupe, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con John Waldegrave , Sheriff of London. Murió en 1271, a la edad de 12 años.
